title: The Envelope with No Name
content: A thick envelope appeared on the reception desk every Monday morning without any name or return address. Inside were newspaper articles about local history carefully organized by date. After several weeks, curiosity spread throughout the office. One employee finally noticed an elderly visitor quietly leaving the envelope before sunrise. He explained that he had collected newspaper clippings for decades and wanted the town museum to preserve them. The anonymous deliveries had never been mysterious gifts but thoughtful contributions to the community's historical archive.
